Science of Limbs LI 436
?Tq*T*n*tT ^ fsrd i
5#: IITon
The following are masculine limbs; Thighs, lips, breasts, testicles,
feet, teeth, arms, hands, cheeks, hairs, throat, nails, thumbs (or
big toes), the frontal bone, armpits, shoulders, ears, anus and joints.
The feminine ones are the brows, nose, buttocks, folds in the belly,
hips, lines on the palm, fingers, tongue, neck, the hind parts of the
shanks, heels, shanks, navel, ear-lobes, and the nape of the neck.
The limbs are the face, back, collar bone, the knees, bones,
the sides, heart, palate, eyes, the male genital organ, chest, end of
